title: Craftable Saddles
description: Craft saddles in older versions of Minecraft using the new 1.21.6 saddle recipe!
body:
## Recipe ![You can craft a saddle using 3 leather and 1 iron ingot.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BJ5dG0xB/images/e4e1fcbac202e43e26b9fdd9e686d8da79e80e66.png) ### How to unlock the recipe in the recipe book? Get leather. ### Recipe Book Category (1.19.4+): Equipment
**Check out my other mods [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Sumbaii999).**
